category_sources: source_facts.description says it implements rootless containers; official README describes RootlessKit as Linux-native fakeroot using user namespaces for Docker and Kubernetes rootless mode.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is RootlessKit; source_facts.name is rootlesskit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains setup, usage, CLI options, and links to additional documents; the repository includes an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo enrichment was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe rootless containers, user namespaces, Docker/Kubernetes rootless mode, and container breakout protection.
